title: MetaJudge Package v2 (Post-Audit)
description: Post-audit v2 of the MetaJudge scoring package. Changes from v1: grading_v2.py adds contains_any numeric fallback in _grade_approx_numeric_small(), enabling correct adjudication of verbose Family B answers with multiple embedded numbers. Import via sys.path.insert(0, '/kaggle/input/metajudge-package-v2').
